title: Bad Fixture: public draft residue
description: A prototype draft fixture intended to fail validation by self-labeling as a draft in the TOML description.
blurb: a prototype draft fixture intended to fail validation by self-labeling as a draft.
one_sentence_claim: If a candidate's description self-labels as a prototype draft, the validator must block it.
why_this_matters: Public-safety regression test for the description-label detector.

demo_parameters.label: expected_outcome
demo_parameters.value: validator blocks on description self-labeling as prototype draft
